popularStory.headline: BIO
popularStory.description:
BIO:  Count of Albon and Grenoble, 1063-1080; Sire de Vion.  Witnessed a charter with his brother Humbert, 20 Aug 1034.

** from http://fmg.ac/Projects/MedLands/BURGUNDY%20Kingdom.htm#Mathildedied1145 …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Guigues Ier d' Albon於大約1001年出生在法國o-阿爾培斯德o姆沙吉拉波吉達阿爾邦時，他的父親Guigues d'Albon32歲，母親Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion31歲。他和Adelaide de Beaujeu至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1075年4月22日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易可倫享年75歲，埋葬在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易可倫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guigues Ier d' Albon于大约1001年出生在法国o-阿爾培斯德o姆沙吉拉波吉達阿爾邦时，他的父亲Guigues d'Albon32岁，母亲Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion31岁。他和Adelaide de Beaujeu至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1075年4月22日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易可倫享年75岁，埋葬在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易可倫。

nameMeanings.name: Albon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Alban
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jorge, Juan, Manuel, Alfonso, Alvaro, Jaime, Luis, Prudencio, Alberto, Andres, Guillermo.
English; Spanish (Albán): from the personal name Alban, Spanish Albán, from Latin Albanus, originally a habitational name for someone from any of the many places in Italy and elsewhere called Alba.
Galician (Albán): habitational name from any of the places called Albán in Galicia, Spain.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Guigues Ier d' Albon was born about 1001, in Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France, his father, Guigues d'Albon, was 32 and his mother, Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion, was 31. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Adelaide de Beaujeu. He died on 22 April 1075, in Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 75, and was buried in Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guigues Ier d' Albon est né environ 1001, à Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, France, son père, Guigues d'Albon, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion, avait 31 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Adelaide de Beaujeu. Il est décédé le 22 avril 1075, à Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guigues Ier d' Albon um 1001 in Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guigues d'Albon 32 und seine Mutter Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion 31. Er hatte mit Adelaide de Beaujeu mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 22. April 1075 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guigues Ier d' Albon è nato il circa 1001 nel Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, il suo padre, Guigues d'Albon, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion, aveva 31 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Adelaide de Beaujeu. Morì il 22 aprile 1075, nel Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Guigues Ier d' Albonが約1001年にフランスルhoネ-アルペスドルoメサイント-ランバート-ド'アルボンで生まれた時，父Guigues d'Albonは32歳，母Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvionは31歳であった。彼はAdelaide de Beaujeuとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1075年4月22日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアークルニーで75歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアークルニーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guigues Ier d' Albon(이)가 대략 1001년 프랑스 ho니-알프스 드o 세인트-램버트-드'알본에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guigues d'Albon(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion(은)는 31세였다. 그는 Adelaide de Beaujeu(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1075년 4월 22일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 클루니에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 클루니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guigues Ier d' Albon nasceu aproximadamente 1001, em Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, França, seu pai, Guigues d'Albon, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion, tinha 31 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Adelaide de Beaujeu. Ele faleceu em 22 de abril de 1075, em Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guigues Ier d' Albon родился около 1001 г. в местности сеинт-рэмбирт-д'албон, дрoм, рoне-алпесь, Франция, его отцу по имени Guigues d'Albon было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion, 31. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Adelaide de Beaujeu. Он умер 22 апреля 1075 г. в местности клуни, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности клуни, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guigues Ier d' Albon nació aproximadamente 1001, en Saint-Rambert-d'Albon, Drôme, Rhône-Alpes, Francia, su papá, Guigues d'Albon, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Gotelena De Clerieux Of Silvion, tenía 31 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Adelaide de Beaujeu. Murió el 22 de abril de 1075, en Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en Cluny, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia.
